text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The latter years of Japan's Edo period saw a classic poetry anthology refashioned with a twist: the Umamusume Hundred Poets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Collecting verses both by and about Umamusume, it serves as a
valuable window into their lives, from daily routine to romance.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: So, we're divining a way to make the new year happy for all! That is what you wanted, right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I... I've spent this whole year being a screwup and causing tons
of trouble for everyone...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: So next year, I-I want to be someone who makes others happy. I know that sounds... laughable coming from me, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: No, no, I'm not laughing at all. It's a noble goal, if you ask me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Besides, a happy new year sounds good to me too, so I'm happy to
help however I can! Now then, let's get to divining!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Fimbally... mimbally... Awe-awe... mubble-maw!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
EIYAHHHH!
EEEEEEEEP!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, we have an auspicious sign! Thank you, Shiraoki! From the
northeast it comes—visions of tatami!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: In the coming year, should you join forces with friends and endeavor in competition, great, great fortune awaits!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-a-anyway, th-that's why I gathered you guys here.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: A team competition! I'm excited already! What are we gonna play?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Glad you asked... Ta-da! Check it out! It's the New Year's tradition, the Umamusume Hundred Poets karuta championship!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, karuta! Long have our forerunners sent cards flying and set mats
ablaze in the heat of competition—or so the legends say!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've seen that on TV! Karuta's the game where everyone races to
grab those big cards, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yep, that's the one! Teams of Umamusume meet in a grand arena to
run and run—run amok, even! Ah, the joys of tradition!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I had no idea what kind of competition I could enter
with friends... so I went to Tazuna for advice.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! Your drive to start the year off honing your skills is truly
admirable!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Thus, a proposal! Say, Tazuna, that New Year's tradition is still going,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes. ♪ She means the URA-sponsored National Umamusume Karuta
Championship.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: In Umamusume karuta, oversized cards featuring the Hundred Poets are arranged in a spacious arena, where teams of four face each other.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can sign up through the academy, so if you'd like to compete,
and have at least four members, I'd be happy to register your team. ♪

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume karuta is a test of speed, knowledge, and teamwork. A
demanding sport indeed, which is perhaps why participation has
declined in recent years...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But fear not! We will ensure that you are well-practiced, properly
registered, and well-dressed! Best of luck!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Magnificent! The curtains rise on a new year to
reveal a numinous new overlord and her entourage—broadcast live for
all to see!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: That sounds fun! Let's do it, let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I like the enthusiasm! This is a sure way to ring in happiness, so I
say we waste no time in signing up!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Our team will be named... Oh, I know—Team Great Fortune in the
New Year!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (Th-that's a relief... I wasn't sure they'd be willing to join...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Now I just have to not screw anything up and be useful... I can't "join
forces" without first being a force myself!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(It's Ayabe! She always lets me train with her, even though I just end
up tripping and wasting her time...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (I... I want to repay her too!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... A-A-Ayabe! Do you, um, maybe have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So, you see, um... for New Year's, me, Fukukitaru, and a couple others
are competing in a karuta tournament.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
My fortune said competing together will bring us all happiness, so I
was wondering if you wanted to join too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This past year, me being such a screwup has caused you a bunch of
trouble, so...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I want to bring happiness to you too!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry, but I'll pass.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wha?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I want to focus on racing right now, so... See you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah... Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(D-did I make her mad? I'm probably the last person she wants any
sort of invitation from...)
